# ng-forge

> A configuration-driven dynamic forms library for Angular. Build complex, reactive forms with minimal code using JSON/TypeScript configurations.

## Overview

Dynamic Forms provides a powerful way to create dynamic forms in Angular applications. Instead of manually building form templates, you define form structure through configuration objects, and ng-forge renders the appropriate UI components automatically.

## Key Features

- Configuration-driven form generation
- Multiple UI library integrations (Material, PrimeNG, Ionic, Bootstrap)
- Built-in validation with expression-based validators
- Conditional logic for showing/hiding fields
- Value derivation for computed fields
- Property derivation for dynamic field properties
- Type-safe form configurations
- Reactive forms under the hood (Angular Signal Forms)
- Value exclusion for controlling submitted form data
- AI integration via MCP server

## Documentation Structure

All documentation paths are adapter-prefixed. Replace `{adapter}` with one of: `material`, `bootstrap`, `primeng`, `ionic`. Use `custom` for the adapter authoring guide.

### Getting Started
- /{adapter}/getting-started: How to install and set up ng-forge dynamic forms in your project

### Configuration
- /{adapter}/configuration: Configure ng-forge with your preferred UI library (Material, PrimeNG, Ionic, Bootstrap)

### Field Types
- /{adapter}/schema-fields/field-types/text-inputs: Text input field types (input, textarea)
- /{adapter}/schema-fields/field-types/selection: Selection field types (select, radio, checkbox, multi-checkbox, toggle)
- /{adapter}/schema-fields/field-types/advanced-controls: Advanced control field types (datepicker, slider)
- /{adapter}/schema-fields/field-types/buttons: Button field types (submit, button, next, previous)
- /{adapter}/schema-fields/field-types/utility: Utility field types (hidden, text, group, row, array, page)

### Validation
- /{adapter}/validation/basics: Validation configuration basics
- /{adapter}/validation/advanced: Conditional validators
- /{adapter}/validation/custom-validators: Custom and expression validators
- /{adapter}/validation/reference: Complete validation reference

### Dynamic Behavior
- /{adapter}/dynamic-behavior/overview: Conditional logic — show/hide fields based on conditions
- /{adapter}/dynamic-behavior/derivation: Value derivation — computed field values
- /{adapter}/dynamic-behavior/derivation/property: Property derivation — dynamic field properties
- /{adapter}/dynamic-behavior/i18n: Internationalization support
- /{adapter}/dynamic-behavior/submission: Form submission handling

### Schema Validation
- /{adapter}/schema-validation/overview: Form-level schema validation overview
- /{adapter}/schema-validation/angular-schema: Angular native schema validation
- /{adapter}/schema-validation/zod: Standard Schema (Zod, Valibot, ArkType) validation

### Layout Components
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/form-pages: Page container components
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/form-groups: Field grouping components
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/form-rows: Row layout components
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/form-arrays/simplified: Simplified array API (recommended)
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/form-arrays/complete: Complete array API (advanced)
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/text-components: Text and label components
- /{adapter}/prebuilt/hidden-fields: Hidden field components

### Examples
- /{adapter}/examples: Browse all examples
- /{adapter}/examples/login-form: Simple login form example
- /{adapter}/examples/contact-form: Contact form with validation
- /{adapter}/examples/user-registration: Multi-field registration form
- /{adapter}/examples/paginated-form: Multi-page wizard form
- /{adapter}/examples/value-derivation: Computed field values example
- /{adapter}/examples/contact-dynamic-fields: Dynamic contact fields
- /{adapter}/examples/business-account-form: Business account form
- /{adapter}/examples/shipping-billing-address: Shipping same-as-billing example
- /{adapter}/examples/age-conditional-form: Age-based conditional form
- /{adapter}/examples/enterprise-features: Complex multi-condition form
- /{adapter}/examples/simplified-array-form: Simplified array API example
- /{adapter}/examples/array-form: Complete array API example

### Advanced Topics
- /{adapter}/advanced/type-safety: TypeScript type safety features
- /{adapter}/advanced/events: Form and field event handling
- /{adapter}/advanced/expression-parser: Expression syntax for validators and conditions
- /{adapter}/advanced/value-exclusion: Controlling which fields are included in submitted form values
- /{adapter}/advanced/custom-fields: Adding custom field types to an existing adapter

### Building an Adapter
- /custom/building-an-adapter: Creating a custom UI integration for ng-forge dynamic forms

### AI Integration
- /{adapter}/ai-integration: MCP server for AI-assisted form schema generation

### API Reference
- /api: Complete API documentation for all packages

## URL Redirect Map (Legacy → Current)

The following old paths redirect permanently to their current equivalents:

- /installation → /material/getting-started
- /getting-started → /material/getting-started
- /ui-libs-integrations → /material/configuration
- /configuration → /material/configuration
- /examples → /material/examples
- /schema-fields/* → /material/schema-fields/*
- /validation/* → /material/validation/*
- /dynamic-behavior/* → /material/dynamic-behavior/*
- /prebuilt/* → /material/prebuilt/*
- /schema-validation/* → /material/schema-validation/*
- /advanced/* → /material/advanced/*
- /custom-integrations → /custom/building-an-adapter
- /building-an-adapter → /custom/building-an-adapter
- /ai-integration → /material/ai-integration
- /{adapter}/installation → /{adapter}/getting-started
- /{adapter}/ui-libs-integrations → /{adapter}/configuration
- /{adapter}/custom-integrations → /{adapter}/building-an-adapter

## Installation

```bash
npm install @ng-forge/dynamic-forms
# Plus your preferred UI library integration
npm install @ng-forge/dynamic-forms-material
```

## Quick Example

```typescript
import { DynamicForm, type FormConfig, type InferFormValue } from '@ng-forge/dynamic-forms';

@Component({
  imports: [DynamicForm],
  template: `<form [dynamic-form]="config" (submitted)="onSubmit($event)"></form>`,
})
export class LoginComponent {
  config = {
    fields: [
      { key: 'email', type: 'input', value: '', label: 'Email', required: true, email: true },
      { key: 'password', type: 'input', value: '', label: 'Password', required: true, minLength: 8, props: { type: 'password' } },
      { type: 'submit', key: 'submit', label: 'Sign In' },
    ],
  } as const satisfies FormConfig;

  onSubmit(value: InferFormValue<typeof this.config.fields>) {
    console.log('Form submitted:', value);
  }
}
```

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/ng-forge/ng-forge
- Documentation: https://ng-forge.com/dynamic-forms/
